data.body:
Goal:
Change Foolery plan storage and retrieval so execution plans are created, listed, fetched, and updated as real execution_plan knots with typed payload data instead of sidecar or process-local storage.

Verification:
1. In the Foolery worktree, run targeted tests for POST /api/plans and GET /api/plans plus GET /api/plans/:id against the Knots-backed execution-plan store; expect persisted payloads to round-trip.
2. Exercise a manual create/list/get flow and confirm the returned planId is the execution_plan knot id and the payload fields match the stored execution_plan data.

Constraints:
- Keep the API surface compatible with the reviewed spec where possible: POST /api/plans, GET /api/plans/:id, and GET /api/plans?repoPath=...
- Treat knot workflow state as plan authoring lifecycle only; runtime plan status remains in the typed payload.
- Resolve storage to execution_plan knots only; do not preserve flat-file plan storage as a fallback.
data.title: Adopt execution_plan knots in Foolery plan APIs
